title: Safety & Security

sql.statement:
SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value
FROM processed_common_data.zone_visits zv
JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = zv.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
WHERE zv.enter_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND zv.enter_time < NOW()

SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value
FROM processed_common_data.trips t
JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = t.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v ON v.object_id = o.object_id
WHERE t.trip_start_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND t.trip_start_time < NOW()
  AND t.max_speed IS NOT NULL
  AND t.max_speed > COALESCE(v.max_speed, 70)

SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value
FROM processed_common_data.driver_performance_events
WHERE device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND device_time < NOW()
  AND event_type IN ('Driver performance braking', 'Driver performance braking and turn')

SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value
FROM processed_common_data.driver_performance_events
WHERE device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND device_time < NOW()
  AND event_type IN ('Driver performance acceleration', 'Driver performance acceleration and turn')

WITH ti AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT i.device_id, i.value::numeric AS v
  FROM raw_telematics_data.inputs i
  JOIN raw_business_data.sensor_description sd ON i.device_id = sd.device_id AND i.sensor_name = sd.input_label
  WHERE i.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND i.device_time < NOW()
    AND (
  sd.sensor_type = 'temperature'
  OR LOWER(COALESCE(sd.input_label, '')) LIKE '%temp%'
  OR sd.sensor_units IN ('°С', '°F', '°C')
)
    AND NOT ((LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(sd.sensor_label, ''))) = 'reefer temperature'))
    AND i.value ~ '^-?[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$'
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT device_id)::numeric AS value FROM ti
WHERE v NOT BETWEEN 25 AND 75

SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value
FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c
WHERE c.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND c.device_time < NOW()
  AND c.event_id IN (2,802,803,804,811)
  AND COALESCE(c.satellites, 0) < 3
  AND c.speed/100.0 > 5

WITH di AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT i.device_id FROM raw_telematics_data.inputs i
  JOIN raw_business_data.sensor_description sd ON i.device_id = sd.device_id AND i.sensor_name = sd.input_label
  WHERE i.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND i.device_time < NOW()
    AND (
  LOWER(COALESCE(sd.input_label, '')) IN ('can_door_state', 'door_state', 'door', 'doors_state')
)
    AND i.value ~ '^[1-9]'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT c.device_id FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c
  WHERE c.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND c.device_time < NOW() AND c.event_id = 969
)
SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value FROM di

WITH sb AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT i.device_id FROM raw_telematics_data.inputs i
  JOIN raw_business_data.sensor_description sd ON i.device_id = sd.device_id AND i.sensor_name = sd.input_label
  WHERE i.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND i.device_time < NOW()
    AND sd.sensor_type = 'sos_button'
)
SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value FROM sb

SELECT COALESCE(z.zone_label, 'Zone ' || zv.zone_id::text) AS zone_label, COUNT(*)::numeric AS crossing_count
FROM processed_common_data.zone_visits zv
JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = zv.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.zones z ON z.zone_id = zv.zone_id
WHERE zv.enter_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND zv.enter_time < NOW()
GROUP BY z.zone_label, zv.zone_id
ORDER BY crossing_count DESC
LIMIT 15

panels.title: Security — risk-tagged vs other zone visits

sql.statement:
/* Risk zones: prefer tag_links (entity_type=1, entity_id=zone_id) + tags.tag_label='risk'. ILIKE on zone_label is a legacy heuristic until all zones are tagged. */ SELECT CASE WHEN (
  z.zone_id IN (
    SELECT tl.entity_id
    FROM raw_business_data.tag_links tl
    JOIN raw_business_data.tags t ON t.tag_id = tl.tag_id
    WHERE tl.entity_type = 1 AND t.tag_label = 'risk'
  )
  OR (z.zone_label ILIKE '%risk%' OR z.zone_label ILIKE '%theft%' OR z.zone_label ILIKE '%robbery%')
)
            THEN 'Risk (tag or heuristic)' ELSE 'Other' END AS risk_category,
       COUNT(*)::numeric AS visit_count
FROM processed_common_data.zone_visits zv
JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = zv.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.zones z ON z.zone_id = zv.zone_id
WHERE zv.enter_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND zv.enter_time < NOW()
GROUP BY 1

panels.title: Security — hourly GNSS degraded (<3 sats, moving)

sql.statement:
WITH hourly AS (
  SELECT date_trunc('hour', c.device_time) AS hr,
         COUNT(*)::numeric AS degraded_points
  FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c
  WHERE c.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND c.device_time < NOW()
    AND c.event_id IN (2,802,803,804,811)
    AND COALESCE(c.satellites, 0) < 3
    AND c.speed/100.0 > 5
  GROUP BY hr
)
SELECT to_char(hr, 'MM-DD HH24') AS event_hour, degraded_points
FROM hourly
ORDER BY hr

panels.title: Safety — top vehicles by overspeed trips

sql.statement:
SELECT COALESCE(o.object_label, 'device_' || t.device_id::text) AS object_label, COUNT(*)::numeric AS overspeed_trip_count
FROM processed_common_data.trips t
JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = t.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v ON v.object_id = o.object_id
WHERE t.trip_start_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND t.trip_start_time < NOW()
  AND t.max_speed IS NOT NULL
  AND t.max_speed > COALESCE(v.max_speed, 70)
GROUP BY o.object_label, t.device_id
ORDER BY overspeed_trip_count DESC
LIMIT 15

panels.title: Safety — hourly overspeed trips vs driver performance events

sql.statement:
WITH lim AS (
  SELECT o.device_id, COALESCE(v.max_speed, 70) AS max_lim
  FROM raw_business_data.objects o
  LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v ON v.object_id = o.object_id
  WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
), over_h AS (
  SELECT date_trunc('hour', t.trip_start_time) AS hr, COUNT(*)::numeric AS n
  FROM processed_common_data.trips t
  JOIN lim ON lim.device_id = t.device_id
  WHERE t.trip_start_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND t.trip_start_time < NOW()
    AND t.max_speed IS NOT NULL
    AND t.max_speed > lim.max_lim
  GROUP BY hr
), perf_h AS (
  SELECT date_trunc('hour', hde.device_time) AS hr, COUNT(*)::numeric AS n
  FROM processed_common_data.driver_performance_events hde
  WHERE hde.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND hde.device_time < NOW()
  GROUP BY date_trunc('hour', hde.device_time)
)
SELECT to_char(COALESCE(o.hr, h.hr), 'MM-DD HH24') AS event_hour,
  COALESCE(o.n, 0) AS overspeed_trips,
  COALESCE(h.n, 0) AS perf_events
FROM over_h o
FULL OUTER JOIN perf_h h ON o.hr = h.hr
ORDER BY COALESCE(o.hr, h.hr)

WITH hourly AS (
  SELECT date_trunc('hour', c.device_time) AS hr,
         ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(c.satellites, 0))::numeric, 2) AS avg_satellites
  FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c
  WHERE c.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND c.device_time < NOW()
    AND c.event_id IN (2,802,803,804,811)
    AND c.speed/100.0 > 5
  GROUP BY hr
)
SELECT to_char(hr, 'MM-DD HH24') AS trip_day, avg_satellites
FROM hourly
ORDER BY hr

WITH hourly AS (
  SELECT date_trunc('hour', i.device_time) AS hr,
         ROUND(AVG(i.value::numeric), 2) AS avg_temp
  FROM raw_telematics_data.inputs i
  JOIN raw_business_data.sensor_description sd ON i.device_id = sd.device_id AND i.sensor_name = sd.input_label
  WHERE i.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND i.device_time < NOW()
    AND (
  sd.sensor_type = 'temperature'
  OR LOWER(COALESCE(sd.input_label, '')) LIKE '%temp%'
  OR sd.sensor_units IN ('°С', '°F', '°C')
)
    AND NOT ((LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(sd.sensor_label, ''))) = 'reefer temperature'))
    AND i.value ~ '^-?[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$'
  GROUP BY hr
)
SELECT to_char(hr, 'MM-DD HH24') AS trip_day, avg_temp
FROM hourly
ORDER BY hr

SELECT COALESCE(o.object_label, 'device_' || d.device_id::text) AS object_label,
       COUNT(*)::numeric AS door_event_count
FROM (
  SELECT i.device_id FROM raw_telematics_data.inputs i
  JOIN raw_business_data.sensor_description sd ON i.device_id = sd.device_id AND i.sensor_name = sd.input_label
  WHERE i.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND i.device_time < NOW()
    AND (
  LOWER(COALESCE(sd.input_label, '')) IN ('can_door_state', 'door_state', 'door', 'doors_state')
)
    AND i.value ~ '^[1-9]'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT c.device_id FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c
  WHERE c.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND c.device_time < NOW() AND c.event_id = 969
) d
JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = d.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
GROUP BY o.object_label, d.device_id
ORDER BY door_event_count DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value
FROM processed_common_data.zone_visits zv
JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = zv.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
WHERE zv.enter_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND zv.enter_time < NOW()

/* Risk zones: prefer tag_links (entity_type=1, entity_id=zone_id) + tags.tag_label='risk'. ILIKE on zone_label is a legacy heuristic until all zones are tagged. */ SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM COALESCE(zv.duration, NOW() - zv.enter_time))) / 3600.0, 2), 0)::numeric AS value
FROM processed_common_data.zone_visits zv
JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = zv.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.zones z ON z.zone_id = zv.zone_id
WHERE zv.enter_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND zv.enter_time < NOW()
  AND (
  z.zone_id IN (
    SELECT tl.entity_id
    FROM raw_business_data.tag_links tl
    JOIN raw_business_data.tags t ON t.tag_id = tl.tag_id
    WHERE tl.entity_type = 1 AND t.tag_label = 'risk'
  )
  OR (z.zone_label ILIKE '%risk%' OR z.zone_label ILIKE '%theft%' OR z.zone_label ILIKE '%robbery%')
)

SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value
FROM processed_common_data.trips t
JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = t.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
WHERE t.trip_start_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND t.trip_start_time < NOW()
  AND NOT (t.trip_start_time::time >= TIME '08:00:00' AND t.trip_start_time::time < TIME '19:00:00')

WITH gaps AS (
  SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
    LEAD(trip_start_time) OVER (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY trip_start_time) - trip_end_time
  )) / 60 AS gap_min
  FROM processed_common_data.trips t
  WHERE t.trip_start_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND t.trip_start_time < NOW()
)
SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value FROM gaps WHERE gap_min >= 20

/* Risk zones: prefer tag_links (entity_type=1, entity_id=zone_id) + tags.tag_label='risk'. ILIKE on zone_label is a legacy heuristic until all zones are tagged. */ SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value
FROM processed_common_data.zone_visits zv
JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = zv.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.zones z ON z.zone_id = zv.zone_id
WHERE zv.enter_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND zv.enter_time < NOW()
  AND (
  z.zone_id IN (
    SELECT tl.entity_id
    FROM raw_business_data.tag_links tl
    JOIN raw_business_data.tags t ON t.tag_id = tl.tag_id
    WHERE tl.entity_type = 1 AND t.tag_label = 'risk'
  )
  OR (z.zone_label ILIKE '%risk%' OR z.zone_label ILIKE '%theft%' OR z.zone_label ILIKE '%robbery%')
)
  AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM COALESCE(zv.duration, NOW() - zv.enter_time)) / 60.0 > 15

WITH last_gps AS (
  SELECT device_id, MAX(device_time) AS last_seen
  FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core
  WHERE device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours' AND device_time < NOW()
    AND event_id IN (2,802,803,804,811) AND latitude <> 0 AND longitude <> 0
  GROUP BY device_id
)
SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value FROM raw_business_data.objects o
JOIN last_gps lg ON lg.device_id = o.device_id
WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE AND lg.last_seen < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'

WITH pw AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT i.device_id FROM raw_telematics_data.inputs i
  JOIN raw_business_data.sensor_description sd ON i.device_id = sd.device_id AND i.sensor_name = sd.input_label
  WHERE i.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND i.device_time < NOW()
    AND ((
  sd.sensor_type IN ('power')
  OR sd.sensor_units = 'kW'
  OR LOWER(COALESCE(sd.sensor_label, '')) = 'voltage'
))
    AND i.value ~ '^[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$'
    AND i.value::numeric < 12
)
SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value FROM pw

SELECT 0::numeric AS value
/* Battery-only: definition pending stakeholder — placeholder zero. */

SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value
FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c
WHERE c.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND c.device_time < NOW()
  AND c.event_id IN (2,802,803,804,811)
  AND COALESCE(c.satellites, 0) < 3
  AND c.speed/100.0 > 5

WITH eligible_devices AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT DISTINCT device_id FROM raw_business_data.sensor_description WHERE sensor_type IN ('speed','acceleration')
), spd AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT c.device_id, c.device_time,
  LAG(c.device_time) OVER (PARTITION BY c.device_id ORDER BY c.device_time) AS prev_t
  FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c
  INNER JOIN eligible_devices ed ON ed.device_id = c.device_id
  WHERE c.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND c.device_time < NOW()
    AND c.event_id IN (2,802,803,804,811)
)
SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value FROM spd WHERE prev_t IS NOT NULL
  AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (device_time - prev_t)) > 900

SELECT to_char(ts, 'HH24:MI') AS event_time,
  vehicle, zone_name, metric
FROM (
  SELECT zv.enter_time AS ts,
    COALESCE(o.object_label, 'device_' || zv.device_id::text) AS vehicle,
    COALESCE(z.zone_label, 'Zone ' || zv.zone_id::text) AS zone_name,
    'zone_visit' AS metric
  FROM processed_common_data.zone_visits zv
  JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = zv.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
  LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.zones z ON z.zone_id = zv.zone_id
  WHERE zv.enter_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND zv.enter_time < NOW()
  UNION ALL
  SELECT c.device_time AS ts,
    COALESCE(o.object_label, 'device_' || c.device_id::text) AS vehicle,
    'satellites=' || COALESCE(c.satellites::text, '?') AS zone_name,
    'gnss_degraded' AS metric
  FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c
  JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = c.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
  WHERE c.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND c.device_time < NOW()
    AND c.event_id IN (2,802,803,804,811)
    AND COALESCE(c.satellites, 0) < 3 AND c.speed/100.0 > 5
) q
ORDER BY ts DESC
LIMIT 300

SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value
FROM processed_common_data.trips t
JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = t.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v ON v.object_id = o.object_id
WHERE t.trip_start_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND t.trip_start_time < NOW()
  AND t.max_speed IS NOT NULL
  AND t.max_speed > COALESCE(v.max_speed, 70)

SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(t.trip_duration_seconds) FILTER (
  WHERE t.max_speed > COALESCE(v.max_speed, 70)) / 60.0, 1), 0)::numeric AS value
FROM processed_common_data.trips t
JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = t.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v ON v.object_id = o.object_id
WHERE t.trip_start_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND t.trip_start_time < NOW()
  AND t.max_speed IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value
FROM processed_common_data.driver_performance_events
WHERE device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND device_time < NOW()
  AND event_type IN ('Driver performance braking', 'Driver performance braking and turn')

SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value
FROM processed_common_data.driver_performance_events
WHERE device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND device_time < NOW()
  AND event_type IN ('Driver performance acceleration', 'Driver performance acceleration and turn')

/* Risk zones: prefer tag_links (entity_type=1, entity_id=zone_id) + tags.tag_label='risk'. ILIKE on zone_label is a legacy heuristic until all zones are tagged. */ SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value
FROM processed_common_data.zone_visits zv
JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = zv.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.zones z ON z.zone_id = zv.zone_id
WHERE zv.enter_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND zv.enter_time < NOW()
  AND (
  z.zone_id IN (
    SELECT tl.entity_id
    FROM raw_business_data.tag_links tl
    JOIN raw_business_data.tags t ON t.tag_id = tl.tag_id
    WHERE tl.entity_type = 1 AND t.tag_label = 'risk'
  )
  OR (z.zone_label ILIKE '%risk%' OR z.zone_label ILIKE '%theft%' OR z.zone_label ILIKE '%robbery%')
)

WITH eligible_devices AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT DISTINCT device_id FROM raw_business_data.sensor_description WHERE sensor_type IN ('speed','acceleration')
), gps AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT DISTINCT c.device_id FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c
  INNER JOIN eligible_devices ed ON ed.device_id = c.device_id
  WHERE c.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND c.device_time < NOW()
    AND c.event_id IN (2,802,803,804,811) AND c.speed/100.0 > 10
    AND (EXTRACT(HOUR FROM c.device_time) >= 23 OR EXTRACT(HOUR FROM c.device_time) < 5)
)
SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value FROM gps

WITH sb AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT i.device_id FROM raw_telematics_data.inputs i
  JOIN raw_business_data.sensor_description sd ON i.device_id = sd.device_id AND i.sensor_name = sd.input_label
  WHERE i.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND i.device_time < NOW()
    AND sd.sensor_type = 'sos_button'
)
SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value FROM sb

WITH last_gps AS (
  SELECT device_id, MAX(device_time) AS last_seen
  FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core
  WHERE device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND device_time < NOW()
    AND event_id IN (2,802,803,804,811)
  GROUP BY device_id
)
SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value FROM raw_business_data.objects o
JOIN last_gps lg ON lg.device_id = o.device_id
WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE AND lg.last_seen < NOW() - INTERVAL '3 hours'

WITH veh_max AS (
  SELECT o.device_id, COALESCE(v.max_speed, 70) AS max_speed
  FROM raw_business_data.objects o
  LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v ON v.object_id = o.object_id WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
), obj AS (
  SELECT device_id, object_label FROM raw_business_data.objects WHERE is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
), ev AS (
  SELECT t.trip_start_time AS device_time, t.device_id, 'Overspeed (trip)' AS ev,
    'Trip max ' || ROUND(t.max_speed::numeric, 1) || ' km/h, limit ' || vm.max_speed::int::text AS detail
  FROM processed_common_data.trips t
  JOIN veh_max vm ON vm.device_id = t.device_id
  WHERE t.trip_start_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND t.trip_start_time < NOW()
    AND t.max_speed IS NOT NULL
    AND t.max_speed > vm.max_speed
  UNION ALL
  SELECT hde.device_time, hde.device_id, hde.event_type AS ev,
    ROUND(hde.speed_kmh, 1)::text || ' km/h' AS detail
  FROM processed_common_data.driver_performance_events hde
  WHERE hde.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND hde.device_time < NOW()
)
SELECT to_char(ev.device_time, 'HH24:MI') AS event_time,
  COALESCE(o.object_label, 'device_' || ev.device_id::text) AS vehicle,
  ev.ev AS event_type, ev.detail
FROM ev JOIN obj o ON o.device_id = ev.device_id
ORDER BY ev.device_time DESC LIMIT 300

WITH ti AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT i.device_id, i.value::numeric AS v
  FROM raw_telematics_data.inputs i
  JOIN raw_business_data.sensor_description sd ON i.device_id = sd.device_id AND i.sensor_name = sd.input_label
  WHERE i.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND i.device_time < NOW()
    AND (
  sd.sensor_type = 'temperature'
  OR LOWER(COALESCE(sd.input_label, '')) LIKE '%temp%'
  OR sd.sensor_units IN ('°С', '°F', '°C')
)
    AND NOT ((LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(sd.sensor_label, ''))) = 'reefer temperature'))
    AND i.value ~ '^-?[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$'
)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT device_id)::numeric AS value FROM ti
WHERE v NOT BETWEEN 25 AND 75

/* Reefer: sensor_label = 'Reefer Temperature'; out-of-band heuristic until product thresholds. */ WITH ti AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT DISTINCT i.device_id
  FROM raw_telematics_data.inputs i
  JOIN raw_business_data.sensor_description sd ON i.device_id = sd.device_id AND i.sensor_name = sd.input_label
  WHERE i.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND i.device_time < NOW()
    AND ((LOWER(TRIM(COALESCE(sd.sensor_label, ''))) = 'reefer temperature'))
    AND sd.sensor_type = 'temperature'
    AND i.value ~ '^-?[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$'
    AND (i.value::numeric < -18 OR i.value::numeric > 15)
)
SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value FROM ti

WITH pw AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT i.device_id FROM raw_telematics_data.inputs i
  JOIN raw_business_data.sensor_description sd ON i.device_id = sd.device_id AND i.sensor_name = sd.input_label
  WHERE i.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND i.device_time < NOW()
    AND (sd.sensor_type IN ('bat_capacity','power','charge') OR LOWER(sd.sensor_label) = 'voltage')
    AND i.value ~ '^[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$'
    AND i.value::numeric < 11
)
SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value FROM pw

WITH eng AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT i.device_id FROM raw_telematics_data.inputs i
  JOIN raw_business_data.sensor_description sd ON i.device_id = sd.device_id AND i.sensor_name = sd.input_label
  WHERE i.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND i.device_time < NOW()
    AND sd.sensor_type = 'engine'
    AND i.value ~ '^[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$' AND i.value::numeric > 105
)
SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value FROM eng

SELECT to_char(i.device_time, 'HH24:MI') AS event_time,
  COALESCE(o.object_label, 'device_' || i.device_id::text) AS vehicle,
  sd.sensor_type AS sensor_class,
  sd.sensor_label AS sensor,
  i.value AS raw_value
FROM raw_telematics_data.inputs i
JOIN raw_business_data.sensor_description sd ON i.device_id = sd.device_id AND i.sensor_name = sd.input_label
JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = i.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
WHERE i.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND i.device_time < NOW()
  AND (
    (
  sd.sensor_type = 'temperature'
  OR LOWER(COALESCE(sd.input_label, '')) LIKE '%temp%'
  OR sd.sensor_units IN ('°С', '°F', '°C')
)
    OR sd.sensor_type IN ('engine','bat_capacity','power','charge')
    OR ((
  sd.sensor_type IN ('power')
  OR sd.sensor_units = 'kW'
  OR LOWER(COALESCE(sd.sensor_label, '')) = 'voltage'
))
  )
ORDER BY i.device_time DESC
LIMIT 300

WITH di AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT i.device_id FROM raw_telematics_data.inputs i
  JOIN raw_business_data.sensor_description sd ON i.device_id = sd.device_id AND i.sensor_name = sd.input_label
  WHERE i.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND i.device_time < NOW()
    AND (
  LOWER(COALESCE(sd.input_label, '')) IN ('can_door_state', 'door_state', 'door', 'doors_state')
)
    AND i.value ~ '^[1-9]'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT c.device_id FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c
  WHERE c.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND c.device_time < NOW() AND c.event_id = 969
)
SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value FROM di

WITH hub_visitors AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT zv.device_id
  FROM processed_common_data.zone_visits zv
  LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.zones z ON z.zone_id = zv.zone_id
  WHERE zv.enter_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND zv.enter_time < NOW()
    AND (COALESCE(z.zone_label, '') ILIKE '%hub%' OR COALESCE(z.zone_label, '') ILIKE '%depot%' OR COALESCE(z.zone_label, '') ILIKE '%delivery%')
), di AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT i.device_id FROM raw_telematics_data.inputs i
  JOIN raw_business_data.sensor_description sd ON i.device_id = sd.device_id AND i.sensor_name = sd.input_label
  WHERE i.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND i.device_time < NOW()
    AND (
  LOWER(COALESCE(sd.input_label, '')) IN ('can_door_state', 'door_state', 'door', 'doors_state')
)
    AND i.value ~ '^[1-9]'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT c.device_id FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c
  WHERE c.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND c.device_time < NOW() AND c.event_id = 969
)
SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS value FROM di WHERE device_id NOT IN (SELECT device_id FROM hub_visitors)

WITH di AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT i.device_id, i.device_time, i.value,
  LEAD(i.device_time) OVER (PARTITION BY i.device_id ORDER BY i.device_time) AS next_t
  FROM raw_telematics_data.inputs i
  JOIN raw_business_data.sensor_description sd ON i.device_id = sd.device_id AND i.sensor_name = sd.input_label
  WHERE i.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND i.device_time < NOW()
    AND (
  LOWER(COALESCE(sd.input_label, '')) IN ('can_door_state', 'door_state', 'door', 'doors_state')
)
)
SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (next_t - device_time))) FILTER (
  WHERE value ~ '^[1-9]' AND next_t IS NOT NULL) / 60.0, 1), 0)::numeric AS value FROM di

WITH merged AS (
  SELECT i.device_time, i.device_id, i.value AS door_signal
  FROM raw_telematics_data.inputs i
  JOIN raw_business_data.sensor_description sd ON i.device_id = sd.device_id AND i.sensor_name = sd.input_label
  WHERE i.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND i.device_time < NOW()
    AND (
  LOWER(COALESCE(sd.input_label, '')) IN ('can_door_state', 'door_state', 'door', 'doors_state')
)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT c.device_time, c.device_id, '1'::text AS door_signal
  FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c
  WHERE c.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND c.device_time < NOW() AND c.event_id = 969
), di AS MATERIALIZED (
  SELECT device_time, device_id, door_signal,
  LEAD(device_time) OVER (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY device_time) AS next_t
  FROM merged
)
SELECT to_char(di.device_time, 'HH24:MI') AS event_time,
  COALESCE(o.object_label, 'device_' || di.device_id::text) AS vehicle,
  di.door_signal,
  CASE WHEN di.next_t IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (di.next_t - di.device_time)) / 60.0, 2) END AS until_next_min
FROM di
JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = di.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
WHERE di.door_signal ~ '^[1-9]' OR di.door_signal = '1'
ORDER BY di.device_time DESC
LIMIT 300

description: Premium Safety & Security: 8 summary KPI, 8 charts (deduped: bar/pie/timeseries/line). Overspeed from trips.max_speed vs vehicles.max_speed; temp excursions 25–75°C non-reefer by unique device; reefer by sensor_label + heuristic, unique devices.
